overview.short: Bhuteshwarnath (or Bhooteshwarnath) (भूतेश्वरनाथ महादेव) also known as Bhakurra Mahadeva (भकुर्रा महादेव) is a temple of Lord Shiva, situated near Marouda Village of Gariaband dist
overview.description: Bhuteshwarnath (or Bhooteshwarnath) (भूतेश्वरनाथ महादेव) also known as Bhakurra Mahadeva (भकुर्रा महादेव) is a temple of Lord Shiva, situated near Marouda Village of Gariaband district, Chhattisgarh, India. It is in the middle of the Gariaband Forests. It is the second largest natural Shivlinga (Lingam) in the world, after Siddheshwarnath in Ziro, Arunachal Pradesh. Local belief holds that the Shivlinga is increasing in size.

topPlaces.name: Gariaband
topPlaces.description: Gariaband is a town and a Nagar Palika in Gariaband district in the state of Chhattisgarh, India. It is district headquarter of the Gariaband district.

topPlaces.name: Sondur River
topPlaces.description: Sondur River is a tributary of Mahanadi and located in Chhattisgarh, India. The river originates from village Navrangpur located in Koraput District of Orissa and meets the Pairi river near Malgaon.

items.note: Gariaband is a town and a Nagar Palika in Gariaband district in the state of Chhattisgarh, India. It is district headquarter of the Gariaband district.
Sondur River is a tributary of Mahanadi and located in Chhattisgarh, India. The river originates from village Navrangpur located in Koraput District of Orissa and meets the Pairi river near Malgaon.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Bhooteshwarnath?
faq.a: The best time to visit Bhooteshwarnath is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

The nearest airport is Swami Vivekananda Airport, Raipur (71 km) and the nearest railway station is Raipur Junction (83 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Bhooteshwarnath?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Bhooteshwarnath at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Bhooteshwarnath?
faq.a: Stays in Bhooteshwarnath start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Bhooteshwarnath?
faq.a: The top attractions are Gariaband, Sondur River.
